lesson: HOPPER TEMP HIGH only on hot afternoons, with a cracked door gasket, means warm air is leaking in. The refrigeration and thermistor are both fine.
symptoms: Condensation forming on the machine exterior.
Hopper temperature running slightly high in warm weather.
Product fine; alarms only in the afternoon.

tests.error-log: Recurring HOPPER TEMP HIGH events logged for the past two weeks. No refrigeration faults alongside.
tests.temp-probe: Hopper running 1–2 °C above spec — worst through the warm afternoon.
tests.inspect-beater: The hopper lid has seen better days — worn fittings, tired seal face. Hard to say if it's making clean contact all round.

flavour: The weather got in. Now it's been evicted.
authenticityNote: A deteriorated hopper door gasket allows warm ambient air infiltration; on hot days this can trigger HOPPER TEMP HIGH alarms while the refrigeration system is completely healthy — a thermistor replacement would fix nothing.
